themes.name: [Mixed] App Performance and Reliability Concerns

quotes.text: the US stock investment process is bad and fails most of the time.
I don’t use this app because managing trades feels difficult compared to other trading platforms.
this app doesn’t work on tablet.

themes.description: Users are experiencing issues with app performance, including crashes, slow loading, and failed synchronizations. Some also mention difficulties in using certain features, such as managing trades, and issues with user interface and user experience.
themes.business_impact: Deteriorating user trust and increasing churn risk due to repeated app crashes and performance issues.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Insufficient testing and quality assurance, outdated infrastructure, and inefficient error handling are contributing to the issues.
themes.action_plan:
• Re-invest in testing and quality assurance, deploy a more robust infrastructure, and implement efficient error handling mechanisms
• Identify and address underlying technical debt
• Provide regular updates and notifications to users affected by app crashes and failures
• Implement a dedicated customer support team to address user concerns and issues
• Enhance user interface and user experience to improve user engagement and retention.

themes.name: [Negative] App Not User-friendly

quotes.text: farzii app hai ye logg bina nse ki website dekhe hi PCR value batane lagte hai jo loss karwate hai logo ka ,,,

farzii app hai order exicute par phle hi brokerage kaat lete hai our fir baad ne profit ko bhi transit money me rokk lete hai our fir wapas usme se bhi phle kati hui brokerage ko wapas kaat lete hai,,
Math nahi ata in logo ko Bhai i swear by god ,  Tum log sab ke sab 1st std mein jao wapis ,
Bekar ghatiya app isme transitions karne ke liye bad me charge leta hei

Is app ko Play Store se ban kar dena chahiye isme hamesha kuchh na kuchh Problem hoti rahti hai.... US account open karne me asamarth hai ye app chahe jitna bar Prayas karo hamesha reject kar deta hai app.....

themes.description: Users are complaining about the app's complexity, poor navigation, and lack of transparency. Many are experiencing difficulty using the app, especially in creating orders and accessing certain features. Additionally, some users are criticizing the app for making losses for them, possibly due to incorrect calculations or unexplained losses.
themes.business_impact: High churn risk, revenue loss, and damage to brand reputation
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The app's onboarding process is unclear, leading to user confusion. Technical issues, such as bugs and glitches, are also causing frustration. Furthermore, some users believe that the app is manipulating their trades or charging unnecessary fees, eroding trust.
themes.action_plan:
• Simplify the onboarding process
• Conduct A/B testing to improve navigation and feature accessibility
• Develop a more transparent and user-friendly interface
• Train customer support on explaining technical issues and providing clear trade explanations
• Address user concerns about trading losses through clear explanations and potentially providing refunds

themes.name: [Positive] Easy US Stock Market Access

quotes.text: I never thought, it’s so easy to invest in US market sitting in your place from India.
IND money is a good application for investing and trading because when you add the money to ind money wallet, no charges, is the best facilities.
Amazing Experience with the INDmoney app.. Good Trading Platform.
Excellent app for investment in stocks as well mutual funds.

themes.description: Users praise the app for making US stock market investments easy to navigate and commission-free, allowing even Indian users to invest without the complexity of traditional US markets.
themes.business_impact: Increased user acquisition and retention through seamless US stock market access, especially among Indian users.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The app's focus on user-centric design and its ability to simplify complex financial systems have created a competitive advantage in the Indian market.
themes.action_plan: • Enhance user onboarding by providing clear, concise educational content on US stock market investing and commission-free trading.
